title: Wonder Festival Summer 2015
wikitext:
[]: Wonder Festival Summer 2015             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu May 21, 2015 6:44 pm This feels like it deserves it's own thread, though if Wonder Fest WILL just figures, it could be merged into another figure thread. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) I'm excited if there's gonna be some cool stuff for Eva's 20th Anniversary this year--I'm almost hoping maybe interesting merch not just limited to figures but I guess we'll see. And as much as I like Azuma's illustration, I want my Yotsuba! fix darn it... I really would love to see on the figures side of things, either Figma or SH Figuarts of the NGE cast. Not necessarily everybody, but more characters besides the "Eva girls" (Rei/Asuka in this case) or pilots. Misato, Hikari, Kensuke, Yui, etc need some love too! As long as they don't neglect Shinji, since he's the MC and all. They could even start up that SH line of the Angels and it'd be cool, I think. Maybe they'll release a new NGE-verse Evangelion Portraits or Petit Eva line, if nothing else? June 24th Edit: This Evangelion Unit-01 Night Battle Version figure is new, no? tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jun 24, 2015 5:53 pm It is new but appears to be just a recolor. Bandai does it all the time, hopefully Kotobukiya keeps it to event exclusives. And hopefully they'll announce other Evas at the actual event.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 24, 2015 7:54 pm To me, sorta looked like NGE Eva-01, but she's categorized as NTE.... Shame it's just a recolor! When abouts is Summer WonderFest?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jun 24, 2015 8:00 pm July 26th http://wf.kaiyodo.net/

[]: Wonder Festival Disappointment 2015             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Jun 24, 2015 11:22 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I really would love to see on the figures side of things, either Figma or SH Figuarts of the NGE cast. Not necessarily everybody, but more characters besides the "Eva girls" (Rei/Asuka in this case) or pilots. Misato, Hikari, Kensuke, Yui, etc need some love too!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jun 24, 2015 11:46 pm We will likely see a nice flood of new garage kits, but only because they've been promoting that and encouraging the fan sculptors since the year started.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 07, 2015 8:59 pm June 25th post: A wild Killer Bee appears! I'm cautiously optimistic, but at least it's nice to dream. July 7th edit: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3875.html Huzzah for old merch returning? Catgirl Ayanami and Monkey Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Shamsiel-kun » Sat Jul 11, 2015 1:52 am ^I...I fail to see why THOSE would need to be reissued. You can pick up that particular set for 500 yen on Y! Auctions Japan... They are "action" figures that can't move, BTW.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 23, 2015 9:17 pm NSFW-ish. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jul 25, 2015 11:01 pm I donno if I'm just doing stuff wrong, but searching both #wf2015s and #ワンフェス hashtags I'm not seeing any Eva stuff. Everything I find is already known for month like the Kotobukiya special coating Eva-01 kit, the special Eva clippers, the giant Bome test suit Asuka. The only fan kit I see is LMU-23's Nyangouki and even then I know about it because I've been following the guy's work since forever. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Jul 25, 2015 11:20 pm Well, I have been checking as many hashtags as I can come up with and yes, it seems dissapointing considering the amount of hype created around this particular event*... Too bad, I wanted some new Revos... *But then again, isn't hype what surrounds the entirety of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 27, 2015 9:16 pm Just posting here in case these guys weren't known: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Jul 27, 2015 9:38 pm Go back to Magellan Castle and stop reminding us how much of a flop this Wonder Fest was for Eva figures!! ~sniff~

[]:             Quote Post by Shamsiel-kun » Tue Jul 28, 2015 2:09 pm Links to Dengeki Hobby's coverage in my post here . IMHO, looks like it sucked. Too many big manufacturers using it as yet another show to display their products, and too little stuff from garage kit makers.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 30, 2015 3:32 pm This new at all? tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Jul 30, 2015 4:12 pm It's new in the sense that it's finally finished and was available to buy. The sculptor has been posting progress pics for about a year.
